Documentation

⚡Quick start guide📦Template documentation🔑API key configuration🚀Deployment guide🔧Troubleshooting FAQ

Template documentation

Each template is a complete, runnable project. Pick your starting point.

Available templates

SaaS Starter

The full-stack starting point. Everything wired, everything typed.

  • Better Auth — magic link, password, Google OAuth
  • Drizzle ORM with Neon Postgres schema
  • Resend for transactional email
  • Polar for subscriptions and one-time payments
  • PostHog for product analytics
  • Trigger.dev for background jobs
  • Admin dashboard for user and billing management

Marketplace Starter

Two-sided marketplace template. Buyers, sellers, listings, and escrow.

  • Everything in SaaS Starter
  • Multi-tenant schema — orgs, roles, permissions
  • Escrow payment flow via Polar
  • Listing and order management
  • Email notifications for both sides

API Backend

Headless API with auth and webhooks. Bring your own frontend.

  • Better Auth with API key authentication
  • Drizzle ORM with clean schema
  • Resend for system emails
  • Trigger.dev for webhook processing
  • PostHog for API usage analytics

Customizing templates

Templates are yours. Edit anything — the logo, the copy, the database schema, the email templates. KILN doesn't lock you into its defaults.

When you pull template updates, use git merge or git rebase. If you've modified shared files, you'll need to resolve conflicts manually.
